name: humanizer-kr
description: Korean-specialized humanizer skill for rewriting AI-sounding Korean into natural, source-grounded Korean.

interface.shortDescription: Natural Korean rewriting for AI-looking drafts.
interface.longDescription: Humanizer KR packages a Codex skill that rewrites Korean drafts with plain-language discipline, register control, Korean-specific AI-writing pattern checks, and source-grounded vocabulary guidance from trusted Korean language resources.
defaultPrompt: Use $humanizer-kr to make this Korean draft sound natural.
Use $humanizer-kr to review this Korean copy for AI-like phrasing.
Use $humanizer-kr with my sample voice to rewrite this text.
